description: 100 real RCTW-17 training images (https://rctw.vlrlab.net), renamed to rctw_default_NN.jpg. Single default intent: image description. GT auto-parsed from the dataset's XML labels (difficulty=0 lines only) — expected_description_keywords is the set of visible text in the image, expected_details maps to the first 6 text regions. The 10 old category types are gone — all fixtures use category='default' + type='info'.
